contract_summary: Get-wrapper for an IPVS connection in the AH/ESP context (ISAKMP). Fills connection parameters from the packet and calls ip_vs_conn_out_get to look up an existing connection, acquiring a reference if found. Returns the connection with an incremented refcount, or NULL if no matching connection exists. The caller must pair this with ip_vs_conn_put to release the reference. The debug message is informational and does not affect the lifecycle.
